member.name: M:Exceptionless.ExceptionlessExtensions.UseExceptionless(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder,Exceptionless.ExceptionlessClient)
member.summary: Adds the Exceptionless middleware for capturing unhandled exceptions and ensures that the Exceptionless pending queue is processed before the host shuts down.
member.param: The target to add Exceptionless to.
Optional pre-configured instance to use. If not specified (recommended), the instance registered in the services collection will be used.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.ExceptionlessExtensions.GetRequestInfo(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,Exceptionless.ExceptionlessConfiguration)
member.param: The http context to gather information from.

member.name: M:Exceptionless.ExceptionlessExtensions.AddRequestInfo(Exceptionless.Models.Event,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,Exceptionless.ExceptionlessConfiguration)
member.summary: Adds the current request info as extended data to the event.
member.param: The http context to gather information from.
